recalls.Description:
Goregent has issued a recall for its infant walkers due to a significant fall hazard that can lead to serious injury or even death. These walkers are characterized by their green color, animal print fabric seat, rotating activity tray with toys, lights, and music, and a round base with six wheels. They are collapsible and feature three adjustable height settings. The model number 901 and SKU GEBA030AGXP are marked on a yellow label on the base of the walker, with a production date of November 2025.

The recalled infant walkers do not comply with mandatory safety standards, as they can easily pass through standard doorways and fail to prevent falling off steps. As a result, they pose a serious risk to infants. Consumers are urged to stop using these walkers immediately and reach out to Goregent for a full refund.
recalls.Title: Goregent Infant Walkers Recalled for Fall Hazard Risk Leading to Serious Injury or Death
recalls.ConsumerContact: Contact Goregent Official Store via email at GoregentInfantWalkersRecall@outlook.com.

Retailers.Name: Online at Amazon.com in January 2026 for about $90.

Distributors.Name: Dongguanshi Aokaolan Trading Co., Ltd., dba Goregent Official Store, of China

Hazards.Name: Fall hazard leading to serious injury or death

Remedies.Name: Stop using the walkers and contact Goregent for a full refund; disassemble the walker, remove the seat, mark 'Recalled' on the tray, and send a photo to GoregentInfantWalkersRecall@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Goregent recalls infant walkers due to fall hazards. Immediate action required for safety and refunds.

recalls.Description: Uuoeebb Infant Walkers are being recalled due to serious safety concerns that could lead to injury or death. These collapsible walkers feature a round base, eight wheels, and seven adjustable height settings, and they were available in gray, black, and pink. A tracking label under the seat indicates the production batch number: 7654.
recalls.Title: Uuoeebb Infant Walkers Recalled Due to Fall and Entrapment Risks; Sold by BaoD on Amazon
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact BaoD via email at Uuoeebbrecalls@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Uuoeebb Infant Walker in gray
"Production Batch: 7654" on tracking label under the seat

Retailers.Name: Online at Amazon.com from December 2024 through September 2025 for between $60 and $90.

Distributors.Name: Hunan Suihuo E-commerce Co., Ltd., dba BaoD, of China

Hazards.Name: These infant walkers do not comply with safety standards, as they can pass through standard doorways and do not stop at steps, creating a fall hazard. Additionally, the design allows a child to slip down, risking head entrapment and potential serious injury or death.

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease using the recalled walkers and reach out to BaoD for a full refund. Disassemble the walker, remove the fabric seat, mark 'Recalled' on the tray with a permanent marker, and email a photo of the walker to BaoD at Uuoeebbrecalls@outlook.com. Dispose of the walker following local waste disposal guidelines.

recalls.metaDescription: Important recall for Uuoeebb Infant Walkers due to serious fall and entrapment hazards. Contact BaoD for refunds and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Boyro Baby is recalling its baby walkers, model number US-B01, due to serious safety concerns. These walkers, available in black, blue, and gray, feature five height adjustments, a rotating seat, matching footpad, six wheels, and four removable toys. The label 'Ready To Ride' can be found on one of the walker's legs, while the model number and brand name are printed on the tracking label beneath the seat cushion.
recalls.Title: Recall of Boyro Baby Walkers Due to Fall Hazard and Lead Content Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact Boyro Baby via email at boyrobaby@outlook.com or visit https://www.boyrobaby.com/round-walker-safety-recall/ or www.boyrobaby.com and click on 'Round Walker Safety Recall'.

Retailers.Name: Amazon.com from August 2024 through December 2024 for between $70 and $90.

Distributors.Name: Hangzhou Christine Trading Co. Ltd., dba Boyro Baby, of China

Hazards.Name: The recalled baby walkers do not comply with federal safety standards for infant walkers, posing a fall hazard that could lead to serious injury or death. Additionally, the brake pads contain lead levels that exceed federal regulations, posing health risks to children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using and disassemble the recalled baby walkers. Contact Boyro Baby for refund instructions. After disassembly, consumers must destroy the walker and email three photos of the destroyed product to boyrobaby@outlook.com to receive a refund. Boyro Baby and Amazon will reach out to known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Boyro Baby recalls walkers due to fall hazards and lead violations. Stop using immediately and contact for refunds.
